is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of Plasmodium falciparum field isolates from patients with uncomplicated falciparum malaria in Kampala.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Reports pfcrt 74,75,76,220,271,326,356,371 and pfmdr-1 86 — several are curated target positions (pfcrt 72... no; but 74,75,76,220,271,326,356,371 and Pfmdr1 86 are all curated).

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: K76T present in 100% of 114 isolates; Table 2 gives genotype counts (mutant/wild/mixed) per codon for the 30-sample case-control set, e.g. N326S sensitive 3 mutant/9 wild/2 mixed.

sub_country_location.evidence: All samples from Kampala, Uganda — a named city (sub-national resolution). Single site.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Samples collected in Kampala from August 1998 through March 1999, a window well under 3 years.

african_field_samples.evidence: Human clinical field isolates collected before treatment from patients in Kampala, Uganda; blood blotted on filter paper.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary empirical study analyzing 114 samples for pfcrt/pfmdr-1 polymorphisms with PCR.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Samples are 'a randomly selected subset of 114 samples from our recent evaluation of chloroquine efficacy in 258 children and adults in Kampala [9]' — subset of a previously-published clinical study cohort.

supplement.evidence: All frequency data present in main text and Table 2; no supplementary materials referenced.

assessment.summary: Primary field study of P. falciparum isolates from Kampala, Uganda (Aug 1998–Mar 1999). K76T pfcrt mutation found in 100% of 114 pre-treatment isolates; Table 2 gives per-codon genotype counts for pfcrt (74,75,76,220,271,326,356,371) and pfmdr-1 (86) in a 30-sample case-control subset. Single named city (sub-country) and <3y collection window satisfy resolution criteria. Samples are a subset of a previously published efficacy cohort, giving medium duplicate risk.
